summary: Iteration 19 - Tested P2 Features: Real-time Streaming Data Ingestion (simulated stream_events) and Push Notifications (notification bell with unread count). All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after layout settles

passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
POST /api/auth/login - admin login successful
GET /api/analytics/overview - requires auth (401)
GET /api/analytics/overview - returns stream data (total_streams: 2670, total_earnings: $13.38, streams_by_store, streams_by_country, daily_streams)
GET /api/analytics/chart-data?days=14 - requires auth (401)
GET /api/analytics/chart-data?days=14 - returns daily plays and revenue aggregated from stream_events
GET /api/analytics/platform-breakdown - requires auth (401)
GET /api/analytics/platform-breakdown - returns 8 platforms with streams, revenue, percentage, color (Spotify top with 1036 streams)
GET /api/analytics/live-feed?limit=20 - requires auth (401)
GET /api/analytics/live-feed?limit=20 - returns recent stream events with platform, country, revenue, timestamp
GET /api/notifications/unread-count - requires auth (401)
GET /api/notifications/unread-count - returns count of unread notifications
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - requires auth (401)
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - marks all notifications as read, returns 0 unread after
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - requires auth (401)
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - marks specific notification as read
GET /api/notifications - requires auth (401)
GET /api/notifications - returns array of notifications
Stream events seeding verification - Spotify is top platform (40% weight as expected)
Frontend: Admin login successful - redirected to dashboard
Frontend: Notification bell found in header
Frontend: Notification panel opens on bell click
Frontend: Analytics page loads with Overview, Live Activity, Audience Map, TikTok UGC, Platforms tabs
Frontend: Live Activity tab shows stream events with platform colors, country flags, revenue
Frontend: Platforms tab shows 8 platforms with pie chart and details (Spotify: 1036, Apple Music: 587, YouTube Music: 407, etc.)
Frontend: My Purchases page loads and shows purchase history
Frontend: Dashboard shows streaming stats (2,670 streams, $13.38 earnings, 5 releases, 133 downloads)
critical_code_review_comments: Stream events collection properly seeded on startup with 8 DSPs (Spotify 40%, Apple Music 22%, YouTube Music 15%, Amazon Music 8%, TikTok 6%, Tidal 4%, Deezer 3%, SoundCloud 2%)
Analytics endpoints correctly aggregate from stream_events collection
Notification bell polls every 30 seconds for unread count
Mark all read and mark individual read endpoints working correctly
Live feed shows real-time streaming events with platform colors and country flags
seed_data_creation: Stream events seeded on startup - ~500+ events per user with releases, spanning 30 days, 8 platforms, 14 countries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 tested P2 features: Real-time Streaming Data Ingestion (simulated stream_events collection) and Push Notifications (notification bell with unread count and dropdown panel). Stream events are seeded on startup with realistic data from 8 DSPs (Spotify 40%, Apple Music 22%, YouTube Music 15%, etc.) and 14 countries. Analytics endpoints aggregate from stream_events: /api/analytics/overview, /api/analytics/chart-data, /api/analytics/platform-breakdown, /api/analytics/live-feed. Notification endpoints: /api/notifications/unread-count, /api/notifications/read-all, /api/notifications/{id}/read. Admin user has 2,670 total streams, $13.38 earnings.

mocked_apis.Resend Email: MOCKED - emails skipped if no RESEND_API_KEY
mocked_apis.DSP Streaming Data: SIMULATED - seeded realistic data on startup, not real DSP feeds
mocked_apis.Stripe: Uses test API key (sk_test_emergent) - creates real checkout URLs

analytics_chart_data.returns: Array of {date, plays, revenue} for each day

analytics_platform_breakdown.returns: Array of {name, streams, revenue, percentage, color}

features: Individual notification click marks as read

analytics_ui.live_activity: Real-time streaming feed with platform colors and country flags
analytics_ui.platforms: Pie chart + details list with 8 platforms
